_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/<exp-id>.json alongside registry/verdicts/ and registry/audits/, tracked by registry/audit-status.jsonl, following the f2b-replicate precedent. Same candidate name 'verifier-offload' as the F2 line: this record is the STAND-IN Stage-1 feasibility read on that line, not a new candidate.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per docs/next/opus-execution-practices.md practice 4: the run (Opus runner-7) produced only the mechanical verdict and the cross-vendor audit recomputed it; what the outcome MEANS is decided here and only here. This record's single job is to fix what the proxy PASS does and does not license; the extrapolation_envelope_verbatim of the frozen record is adopted BINDING and quoted where load-bearing.

verdict_ref._verdict_note: Effective PASS: the mandatory Gate-A cross-vendor audit is CONFIRM on file (11/11 checks, byte-recompute matches the verdict object exactly), so the sole condition the PENDING-AUDIT suffix waited on is discharged. The in-place upgrade of the verdict object (verdict -> PASS, audit.path/state filled), the f2b-replicate-precedent mechanical step, belongs to the Opus runner lane and is pending at assessment time; this assessment interprets the audited bytes (sha256 above = verdict_object_audited_sha256 in the audit record) and does not touch the verdict file.

_surprise_note: No registered prior exists: the wilson_gate expected_rate 0.85 in the frozen record is a POWERING stipulation (decidability sizing), not a prereg prediction, so the measured 0.95 sitting above it licenses no 'surprise-*' tag. Under envelope clause 5 (asymmetric reading) a PASS was in any case the anticipated, LOW-information branch -- the disclosed channels (family bias, tradition familiarity) plausibly push A_1p up, so the run's principal decision value was the cheap kill it did NOT deliver. The one mildly informative margin note: even read maximally skeptically, the 0.95 point with LB 0.9275 clears the 0.70 bar by a distance no plausible-magnitude style inflation obviously accounts for on its own -- but 'obviously' is not a measurement, and this note deliberately carries no weight anywhere below.

interpretation.kill_chain_read: The kill analog (the only hypothesis gate) did not fire: A_1p = 342/360 = 0.95, one-sided 95% Wilson lower bound 0.9275 >= 0.70 [MEASURED]. Both instrument gates held: adjudication_valid = true (preflight first-attempt pass; 360/360 items labelled, 0 no-labels, 1 escape counted as disagreement; raw judge-1p/judge-2 agreement 0.9639 >= 0.80, informative in its FAIL direction only) and probe_valid = true (deranged-gloss probe: 60/60 labelled, false-endorsement 1/60 = 0.0167 << 0.30, NONE rate 0.9833) [MEASURED]. Reported-only single-family diagnostics: a_j2 = 0.9583, a_panel_concordant = 0.9712, panel_unresolved_fraction 0.0361 -- correlation context, never validation. Verdict rule 2 (PASS) fired; the Gate-A cross-vendor audit (Codex/GPT-5.5, auditor-6) independently recomputed every verdict-bearing quantity from pinned bytes and matched exactly, 11/11 checks [MEASURED]. The audit certifies the PASS as the correct pure function of frozen record + amendments + hash-chained log + pinned analysis -- and certifies NOTHING about judge quality or about H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC.
licenses: [MEASURED] H-PROXY-ENDORSE, at exactly its construction and nothing wider (envelope clause 4 verbatim): 'an independent, kernel-instance-naive LLM, under blind rendering with a demonstrated working escape, endorses the kernel's record content at the pre-declared bar on the 360 d-qa-t items'. A_1p = 0.95, Wilson LB 0.9275 vs bar 0.70. This is a certified mechanical result about ONE pinned judge (GPT-5.6-Sol, effort low) on ONE pinned item set.

[MEASURED] The escape function works and the crude style-endorsement channel is bounded: on the deranged-gloss probe (own-gloss deranged out by a seed-pinned Sattolo cycle, correct answer NONE by construction) the judge false-endorsed 1/60 = 0.0167, far under the 0.30 invalidation bar, answering NONE on 59/60. The judge demonstrably withholds endorsement when record content is wrong-for-the-item, so its endorsement of the real items is not the CRUDEST form of NSM-style reflex (H-PROXY-STYLE's bounded form). The subtle familiarity channel is NOT bounded by this (see does_not_license).

[MEASURED] A letter-level circularity break, at proxy strength only: this is the first record in which kernel record content is endorsed by a label function OTHER than the kernel verifier's own string equality -- the d-qa/d-qa-r gold-definition circularity is broken 'in the letter, but with WEAKER independence than a human judge' (envelope clause 3, adopted verbatim). It is evidence about the INSTRUMENT'S constructibility, not about gold-label independence of the f2b lift.

[MEASURED] Verdict standing: cross-vendor Gate-A CONFIRM (11/11; recomputed A_1p, Wilson LB, all diagnostics, both gates, and all five hashes byte-match). The PASS is the correct pure function of the pinned bytes.

[STIPULATED: ASM-0022] The ENTIRE decision content of the PASS -- programme sequencing only: the kill-(d)-analog cheap pause did NOT fire, so continued investment in the line is licensed: human judge-1 recruitment proceeds, f2b-transfer Stage-2 harness BUILD-OUT (engineering, not unblinding, not GPU cells) proceeds. A PASS 'licenses only continued investment ... and never upgrades any claim' (envelope clause 5).

[MEASURED] The comparator for ASM-0021's resolution is now pinned: A_1p = 0.95 on the exact 360 blind item bytes and S1-S7 standards the human round will judge. When the human-judged f2b-transfer Stage-1 reads out, human-A minus 0.95 on identical items is a direct, zero-marginal-cost measurement of LLM-judge bias (ASM-0021's registered resolution path). This comparator role is the proxy's most durable scientific value.

[EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0044] Operational de-risking of the human round: the section-4 adjudication machinery (blind rendering contract, working escape, item decidability, position-pinned shuffle) executed end-to-end with zero instrument events. Extending that operational feasibility to a human judge is registered as ASM-0044 (non-load-bearing; human attention, fatigue, and ergonomics unmeasured).
does_not_license: [ENVELOPE-BOUND, clause 4 verbatim -- the ceiling] The PASS 'is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0022). It does NOT adjudicate H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC, does NOT substitute for f2b-transfer Stage-1, does NOT license f2b-transfer Stage-2 GPU cells or promotion of any f2b claim, and does NOT extend to human judges, public-benchmark surfaces, other corpora, other rungs, or any coverage-general claim'. Every downstream citation of A_1p = 0.95 inherits this sentence.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, clause 1] The estimand is 'GPT-5.x-family endorsement of the kernel's content', not blind human concept competence. Judge-1p (GPT-5.6) and diagnostic judge-2 (GPT-5.5) are same-vendor, adjacent-generation models; their raw agreement 0.9639 and the panel analog 0.9712 are CORRELATION DIAGNOSTICS -- family-level bias can inflate or deflate A_1p independent of real kernel content, and high agreement validates nothing.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, clause 2 + ASM-0021] Instance-naive is not tradition-naive: NSM literature and NSM-style explications are plausibly in GPT-5.x training data, so the judge may endorse a familiar explication STYLE rather than judge content from concept competence -- 'a channel that inflates A_1p under BOTH hypotheses'. The probe bounds only its crudest form. Therefore 0.95 is NOT a prediction of the human judge's A, and a materially lower human number would not contradict this record -- it would MEASURE the bias (ASM-0021's resolution).

[ENVELOPE-BOUND] The feasibility-synthesis section-2b confound is moved by exactly nothing here: the f2b +0.1507 lift remains correct-ALIGNMENT-specific (not 'kernel-content-specific'), the open question remains GOLD-LABEL independence, and 'NO experiment that could de-confound it (human f2b-transfer; the K-NULL aligned-non-NSM-store ablation) has read out' -- this proxy is explicitly not that experiment. Adjudication of H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC belongs solely to the frozen, unconsumed f2b-transfer (frozen_sha256 b341a0901e12023d3c56bdc196be0b9c492c7d348f988416d7e9c43aade20879); deciding what the +0.1507 is evidence OF belongs to the frozen knull ablation (+ its content-injection map precondition).

[DESIGN-BOUND] No host model, no GPU cell, no end task: nothing here is a lift, a transfer result, or a usefulness result. Law-2 obligations (kernel-as-text null, matched-budget baselines) live in f2b-transfer Stage-2, untouched. This record measured a JUDGE, not a model.

[DESIGN-BOUND] The Gate-A CONFIRM certifies verdict-function correctness from pinned bytes only; it does not validate judge quality, and the auditor's own family overlap with the judges (GPT-5.5) is disclosed in the audit record -- irrelevant to a byte recompute, load-bearing for anything more, which is why nothing more is claimed.

[ENVELOPE-BOUND, mandatory coverage restatement] Kernel-expressibility coverage is 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance -- NOT general coverage. The 360 d-qa-t items exercise the 108-covered-concept slice; every statement about 'the kernel's content' in this record is bounded to that slice, and no accuracy or endorsement claim extends beyond it.

[BINDING-NOTE] f2b-transfer is byte-untouched: its frozen record, prereg doc, d-adj-t placeholder pins, single-draw adjudication round, human judge-1 path, and the deliberately uncontaminated judge-3 tie-break instrument all stand exactly as frozen. This proxy consumed none of them; it neither fills f2b-transfer's pins nor appends to its log.

epistemic_promotions.scope: the proxy's construction verbatim (envelope clause 4); ceiling: WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0022); never H-TRANSFER evidence

epistemic_promotions.scope: this judge, this probe construction (false-endorsement 0.0167 < 0.30); the subtle tradition-familiarity channel is NOT bounded and remains open (ASM-0021)

epistemic_promotions.claim: any statement about human judges, H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC, f2b promotion, Stage-2 unblinding, other corpora/rungs, or coverage-general endorsement
epistemic_promotions.to: NO PROMOTION -- remains UNMEASURED (human round) or EXTRAPOLATION
epistemic_promotions.scope: no promotion; envelope clause 4 binds every citation

forks_resolved.resolution: SUPPORTED at the proxy's construction: A_1p 0.95, Wilson LB 0.9275 >= 0.70, instrument gates valid, audit-confirmed. Capped verbatim at WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (envelope clause 4 / ASM-0022); resolves nothing outside the proxy id.

CRUDE FORM BOUNDED: probe false-endorsement 0.0167 << 0.30, so the instrument stands and the judge is not reflex-endorsing NSM-shaped text it can see is wrong-for-the-item. SUBTLE FORM UNRESOLVED BY DESIGN: tradition-familiarity endorsement that tracks item-correct glosses cannot be separated from content competence inside this design; deferred to the human-vs-proxy comparison on identical items (ASM-0021 resolution path) and, for the f2b line's interpretation, to the truth-x-style 2x2 probe.

GATE HELD IN ITS ONLY INFORMATIVE DIRECTION: raw agreement 0.9639 >= 0.80, so no instrument-instability finding. Its pass direction validates nothing (single model family, by design); the fork closes as an instrument-stability fact plus a recorded correlation diagnostic, never as independent validation.

_mechanism_note: 'alive' here means precisely: the verifier-content line survived the cheapest kill shot available to it (the kill-(d) analog at ~USD 3 actual spend), and the pre-registered pause-and-escalate response was not triggered. It does NOT mean the mechanism's attribution question moved: alignment-vs-content (knull) and transfer-vs-circularity (human f2b-transfer) are both still fully open.

questions_opened.question: FOREGROUND (unchanged, sharpened): run the frozen human-judged f2b-transfer Stage-1, then compute human-A minus A_1p (= 0.95) on the identical 360 blind items -- simultaneously the H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC adjudication (its own frozen job) and the direct measurement of LLM-judge bias that resolves ASM-0021. The proxy makes the second readout free; it contributes nothing to the first.
questions_opened.note: marginal cost ~0 ON TOP OF the human round itself, which is human-availability-blocked, not compute-blocked

questions_opened.question: TIMING-CRITICAL, reaffirmed not newly opened (feasibility-synthesis section-3d): because this PASS licenses Stage-2 harness build-out (ASM-0022) while closing NONE of the confounds, the pre-unblind obligations bind harder -- truth-x-style 2x2 probe (frozen: truthstyle-2x2), knull + its content-injection map precondition, and the pre-frozen failure-cause taxonomy must land BEFORE f2b-transfer Stage-2 unblinds or they lose confirmatory standing forever.

OPTIONAL, cheap: repeat the proxy protocol with a second-FAMILY LLM judge (non-GPT vendor) on the same pinned bytes. Converts the single-family correlation diagnostic into a genuine cross-family panel and bounds family-level bias -- while remaining capped at the same weak-proxy ceiling and remaining NO substitute for the human round. Only worth running if the human round stays blocked long enough to need a second sequencing read.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED planning estimates, never measurements. Deliberately NO new science stubs: this record's outcome changes programme sequencing only (ASM-0022); the science queue (human f2b-transfer, knull, truthstyle-2x2) was already correct before it ran and is reaffirmed, not reshaped.

ledger_updates.statement: STAND-IN Stage-1 proxy: pinned GPT-5.6-Sol in the judge-1 role endorses the kernel's record content on 342/360 blind d-qa-t items (A_1p = 0.95, one-sided 95% Wilson LB 0.9275 >= 0.70); cross-vendor Gate-A audit CONFIRM 11/11.

ledger_updates.statement: Adjudication instrument clean end-to-end: preflight first-attempt pass; 360/360 labelled, 0 no-labels, 1 escape (counted disagreement); deranged-probe false-endorsement 1/60 = 0.0167 (NONE 59/60); raw family agreement 0.9639, a_j2 0.9583, a_panel_concordant 0.9712, panel unresolved 0.0361 (correlated single-family diagnostics, never validation).

ledger_updates.statement: The f2b-transfer section-4 adjudication machinery (blind rendering, position-pinned shuffle, working escape, S1-S7 standards) is executable end-to-end without instrument events; extension of that operational feasibility to a human judge is ASM-0044 (EXTRAPOLATION, non-load-bearing).

ASM-0021 stays open (this run pins its comparator: A_1p = 0.95 on the human round's exact item bytes); ASM-0022 stays open and discharged its designed decision role in the PASS direction (continue investment; falls away when the human round runs); ASM-0044 newly registered.

tree_impact: verifier-offload mini-tree: NO promotion and NO demotion -- the candidate's promotion boundary remains exactly f2b-replicate's envelope scope, and the sole positive end-task result remains attribution-confounded precisely as feasibility-synthesis section-2b states. What this record changes is SEQUENCING only: (1) the cheap kill branch is closed -- the kill-(d) analog did not fire, so the pre-registered pause-and-escalate response is not triggered and the verifier-content line continues; (2) per ASM-0022 the PASS licenses human judge-1 recruitment and f2b-transfer Stage-2 harness BUILD-OUT (engineering only -- no GPU cells, no unblinding, no claim upgrade); (3) the ASM-0021 comparator is pinned (A_1p 0.95 on the human round's exact item bytes), making the eventual human-vs-proxy delta a free bias measurement; (4) the section-3d pre-unblind obligations (truthstyle-2x2, knull + content-injection map, failure-cause taxonomy) bind HARDER, because build-out is now licensed while every confound they exist to close is still open. Adjudication geography is unchanged and worth restating: H-TRANSFER vs H-CIRC belongs solely to the frozen human-judged f2b-transfer Stage-1; what the +0.1507 is evidence OF belongs to the frozen knull ablation. Ledger mechanics: the fable cell for f2b-transfer-llmproxy in registry/audit-status.jsonl moves pending -> done referencing this record, closing the last VERDICTED-pending interpretation in the registry; the verdict object's in-place PASS-PENDING-AUDIT -> PASS upgrade (audit CONFIRM on file) is the Opus runner's pending mechanical step; feasibility-synthesis section-3a needs only an audit-state refresh (PASS-PENDING-AUDIT -> audit-CONFIRMED PASS), its weak-proxy framing being adopted verbatim here.
